title: いつか交わるその日まで！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Chiyono O and Ardan both injure
themselves at the Japanese Derby and won't be
able to race for a while.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I know they'll be back on the track someday!
After all, there's still a bunch of fiery races like
the Derby that we need to run together!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno and I vow to work hard so we can be
worthy rivals to Chiyono O and Ardan when they
return!
